creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm trying to build building www/redmine51 without x11, it doesn't work anymore after these commits, it was working fine on 2024Q3:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/ff20a70597bc7987d3fd0fda19acc31c67848d7b
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/e72ba6453422807521418bc76e5b352f42e5dbfa
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/606efbe70dc5c406103affda8d888471d881baa4
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/87ccdb191deff44cfd027ef1370a0e7b9f615d74

I have DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=imagemagick=7-nox11 in make.conf

How am I suppose to get back to the previous behaviour? ie nox11?
